business.headline: The global oil crisis is worsening. How badly is it being underestimated?Crude oil prices are rising, supply is tightening, and the West Asia war shows no sign of ending. So how much of this oil crisis is the world still underestimating?

Why KYC is everywhere and why it frustrates so many IndiansCKYC was meant to make identity verification a one-time process, but for most Indians, KYC remains a repeated, unavoidable step across platforms. This story unpacks why a system built to simplify verification still leaves users proving who they are, again and again.

The first 30 days of FY27: 7 smart money moves to make in AprilThe new financial year has just begun, and April is the time to take charge. The decisions you make now can shape your money journey for the rest of the year. In our new 'MONEY MAKEOVER' series, we break down simple, smart steps to get started right.

Tech layoffs: Is AI replacing jobs or are companies fixing overhiring?Job cuts have been reported across tech companies, showing that the trend is not limited to a single type of company. The trend has raised a key question. Are companies correcting overhiring from the past, or is artificial intelligence starting to reduce the need for certain roles?

DA hike: How much will your salary and pension increase this time?With the next dearness allowance (DA) hike expected soon, central government employees and pensioners are watching closely. Even a small rise can push up monthly income, but how much extra can you really expect this time?

Markets down, rupee weak. Why Iran war may now hit your home loanThe impact of Iran war has not been limited to Dalal Street. The rupee has also come under pressure as oil prices moved higher. Now, the ripple effect of the conflict could reach households, especially those with home loans.

Iran war hit your portfolio? Track these 4 signals to stay ahead on Dalal StreetFor investors, the bigger challenge is not just falling markets, but the confusion around what to track. Headlines are changing rapidly, with mixed signals on escalation, oil prices and supply disruptions. This makes it difficult to take clear investment decisions.

Getting 8.2% on small savings? Don't invest before these 5 key checksGetting returns of up to 8.2% on small savings schemes may sound like an easy win. But before you lock your money in, it's worth pausing to check a few basics that could impact your finances later.

Income tax filing 2026: Which 5 key links should every taxpayer check now?Filing your income tax return in 2026 may feel a bit different this time. With the portal revamped and new rules in place, knowing where to click can save both time and effort. Here are five key links you should not miss.

Layoffs everywhere, but this company says no job cutsThe company has said it will not cut jobs despite ongoing global uncertainty. It has committed to retaining its workforce and continuing salary payments without delay.
Good Friday 2026: Is stock market open or closed today?Both stock exchanges, the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) and the National Stock Exchange (NSE), are closed on April 3 on account of Good Friday.

Why buying diamonds is expensive but fails as an investmentThe biggest issue with diamonds is the resale value. Unlike gold, which can be sold easily at market-linked prices, diamonds do not have a strong resale market.

Govt puts mandatory 60% free airline seat rule on hold amid jet fuel price riseThe government has put on hold its directive requiring airlines to offer at least 60% of seats without additional charges, pending further review.

Economic costs are increasing every day: Dr Sajjid Chinoy on impact of Iran warDr Sajjid Z Chinoy, MD and Chief India Economist at JP Morgan, discussed the escalating economic impact of the war on global and Indian markets.

India imposes 25% cap on monthly jet fuel price increase for domestic flightsIndia imposes 25% cap on monthly jet fuel price increase for domestic flights, Reuters reports citing an official statement

Good Friday holiday: Will NSE and BSE be open or closed on April 3?The stock market holiday list for 2026 includes a total of 16 non-trading days, excluding weekends. With several holidays already behind us, there are still multiple breaks lined up over the coming months.

Gold slips over RS 5,000, silver plunges Rs 15,000: What's behind the sudden fall?Precious metals, often seen as safe bets in uncertain times, have unexpectedly slipped. The latest drop in gold and silver prices has left investors wondering what's driving the decline despite global tensions.
Sensex ends 185 points higher, Nifty above 22,700; HCLTech up 3%Sensex ends 185 points higher, Nifty above 22,700; HCLTech up 3%

Markets rebound: Sensex, Nifty recover losses after early crash. Here's whyEarlier in the day, both Sensex and Nifty had fallen nearly 2%, reacting to fresh comments from US President Donald Trump, who said the United States would hit Iran "extremely hard" in the coming weeks.

Form 15G, 15H gone: Will new Form 121 simplify TDS for taxpayers?Form 121 is a self-declaration that allows individuals to request that no TDS be deducted on certain types of income. This usually includes interest earned from bank deposits, post office schemes, or similar sources.

entertainment.headline: LIK trailer: Love meets tech in Pradeep Ranganathan, Vignesh Shivan's sci-fi rom-com Directed by Vignesh Shivan, Love Insurance Kompany is a futuristic romance where algorithms dictate love. Starring Pradeep Ranganathan and Krithi Shetty, the film explores modern relationships in a tech-driven world.

Shah Rukh Khan, Salman Khan add glamour at a wedding in Delhi. Videos Bollywood stars Shah Rukh Khan and Salman Khan attended a wedding in Delhi. The event also saw appearances from political and other film personalities.

Rashmika Mandanna marks 30th birthday with fierce new poster from Mysaa Rashmika Mandanna celebrates her 30th birthday with the release of a new poster from her upcoming film Mysaa. It features her transformation into a warrior character.

Prabhas's Fauzi team issues warning after set pics surface online The makers of Fauzi have issued a strict warning after leaked set photos circulated online, urging fans not to share or engage with such content.

When Dhurandhar's Rakesh Bedi got surprise call mid-interview from Vicky Kaushal Rakesh Bedi received a surprise call from Vicky Kaushal, who praised his performance in Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge, calling it incredible and fun to watch.

Janhvi Kapoor recalls seeing her morphed images on porn site: There is no morality Janhvi Kapoor revealed that at age 15, she discovered a morphed image of herself on a porn site, a shocking experience that still affects her today. She explained how AI-generated visuals continue to circulate online, creating misleading impressions and impacting her professional life.

Hrithik Roshan reacts to Ramayana VFX debate, calls for mindful criticism Hrithik Roshan weighed in on the VFX debate around Ramayana, urging audiences to understand creative intent rather than dismiss visuals outright.

Global first, desi later: Ramayana's bold, big-screen bet beyond Indian box office The Ramayana teaser signals a bold global-first rollout, with the makers positioning the epic for international audiences from the outset. Here's why this ambitious approach, backed by scale and storytelling, could redefine how Indian epics travel worldwide.

Dhurandhar 2 Day 17: Film crosses Rs 1,564 crore globally and Rs 1,179.30 in India Dhurandhar 2 continues its blockbuster run, crossing Rs 1000 crore in India gross and Rs 1,564 crore worldwide. Ranveer Singh's spy thriller sees a strong third-week boost.
Ranveer Singh recreates Akshaye Khanna's viral Dhurandhar line at NMACC gala. Watch Ranveer Singh recreated iconic dialogues from Dhurandhar at the NMACC gala, winning cheers from the audience.

Ranbir Kapoor as Rama looks a little harsh: TV's popular Lakshman, Sunil Lahri Actor Sunil Lahri shared his views on Ranbir Kapoor's portrayal of Lord Rama in Ramayana Part 1, amid mixed reactions to the teaser. While noting certain missing qualities, he expressed confidence that the actor will justify the role.

Rashmika cuts cake at airport, heads for birthday getaway with Vijay, family. Video Ahead of her birthday on April 5, Rashmika Mandanna cut a cake at the airport before flying out for a vacation on Saturday. Videos quickly went viral. Vijay Deverakonda and his family were also spotted, adding to the buzz around the celebrations.

Patriot trailer out: Mammootty-Mohanlal's film promises high-stakes spy action The trailer of Patriot brings Mammootty and Mohanlal together on screen after 18 years. The spy action drama promises an intense story around a controversial intelligence mission.

Dhurandhar, Chhaava and newcomer of 550 films: Anupam Kher with Ranveer and Vicky Anupam Kher's fun selfie with Ranveer Singh and Vicky Kaushal from NMACC's anniversary celebration grabbed attention online. The actor praised the duo's talent and dedication while calling himself a "newcomer" in a note.

Divya Dutta shares how she stood up to man harassing her sister: Whacked his wits Divya Dutta recalled a childhood incident where she confronted a man harassing her sister, crediting her mother for giving her the courage to stand up against wrongdoing. She was last seen in Chiraiya.

Malayalam director Ranjith gets 3-day police custody in assault case Malayalam director Ranjith has been sent to three-day police custody in a sexual assault case filed by an actor. The probe is being handled by a Special Investigation Team, while Keralam CM Pinarayi Vijayan said due process is being followed.

Dacoit trailer: Adivi Sesh, Mrunal Thakur lead a tale of love and betrayal The trailer of Dacoit promises a gripping tale of love, betrayal and revenge, led by Adivi Sesh and Mrunal Thakur. Packed with action and emotion, the film is set for a multilingual theatrical release on April 10.

Anurag Kashyap's Dev.D returns to theatres this April Dev.D, Anurag Kashyap's cult classic, is set to return to theatres this April. Known for its bold storytelling and memorable music, the film stars Abhay Deol, Kalki Koechlin and Mahie Gill.

Toaster trailer: Rajkummar Rao, Sanya Malhotra bring dark twist to everyday life Rajkummar Rao and Sanya Malhotra's Toaster trailer promises a quirky, chaotic story centred around an ordinary household item that leads to merry chaos. The films marks the debut as producer of actor and Rao's wife Patralekhaa.

general news.headline: US destroys own warplanes during pilot rescue op, Iran shares pic of wreckageA US official told the Wall Street Journal that the two MC-130J transport planes appeared to have gotten stuck during the rescue op. They were destroyed by US forces to prevent them from falling into Iranian hands.

Picture abhi baki hai: Raghav Chadha defends Punjab record as AAP tensions escalateA video, sharp rebuttals, and a public clash. Raghav Chadha's response to AAP's accusations opens up a deeper rift within the party, raising questions about what led to this internal showdown.

He was behind enemy lines: The stunning extraction of downed US pilot from IranA US airman hunted in Iran for two days, a race against enemy forces, airstrikes to hold them back, and a rescue that nearly faltered - a high-stakes mission with multiple twists.

If India tries to...: Pakistan minister warns of striking Kolkata in future warA Kolkata strike warning, talk of entering Indian homes, and no evidence to back claims. Pakistan's latest remarks come right after Rajnath Singh's strong message. What's behind this fresh escalation?

When Dhurandhar's Rakesh Bedi got surprise call mid-interview from Vicky KaushalRakesh Bedi received a surprise call from Vicky Kaushal, who praised his performance in Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge, calling it incredible and fun to watch.

SRH vs LSG Live Score: Sunrisers in tatters as Lucknow dominate powerplayHyderabad (SRH) vs Lucknow (LSG) Live Score, IPL 2026: Prince Yadav has taken the wicket of Ishan Kishan as the Sunrisers are in all sorts of trouble after being asked to bat first. Heinrich Klaasen has joined Liam Livingstone in the middle.

US readies its most lethal missiles as Iran war enters dangerous new phaseAfter the loss of two fighter aircraft, the US is positioning the bulk of its lethal long-range JASSM-ER missiles in readiness to strike Iran, reported Bloomberg.

Nepal implements 2-day weekly off to tackle fuel crunch amid Iran warNepal has introduced a two-day weekly holiday for government offices due to a fuel shortage, shifting from the earlier single-day system. Office timings have also been extended to 9 am-5 pm to compensate for reduced working days.

With Rs 500 for a kg of LPG, chhotu cylinder turns big daddyFor migrants, bachelors and street vendors, the small 5-kg cylinder has been a lifeline. Now the Iran war-induced LPG crunch has pushed their illegal refill rate to Rs 400-500 a kg. And the legal 5-kg cylinders are hard to find. Truly, the chhotu has become the baap, or even the granddaddy of LPG cylinders.

Live: Iran says it downed 2 C-130 jets, 2 Black Hawks during US rescue missionUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Tensions in the Middle East escalated sharply on Saturday after Donald Trump warned Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours, threatening severe consequences if it fails to comply. Meanwhile, the International Atomic Energy Agency reported that one person was killed by debris following joint US-Israeli strikes near Iran's Bushehr nuclear facility. At the same time, Israeli forces carried out fresh air raids across several towns in southern Lebanon, intensifying cross-border hostilities. In the Gulf, the UAE Ministry of Defence said its air defences intercepted 23 ballistic missiles and 56 drones launched from Iran. The fallout has also hit energy supplies, with Iraq reporting a complete halt in Iranian gas deliveries to its southern regions. Follow IndiaToday.in for the latest updates.

We got him: Trump says missing pilot of downed F-15 safely rescued from IranMissing since the downing of his fighter aircraft in Iran, the US Air Force pilot has been rescued and safely evacuated after a dramatic firefight. Trump confirmed the pilot is "safe and sound" after a "daring" operation.

The global oil crisis is worsening. How badly is it being underestimated?Crude oil prices are rising, supply is tightening, and the West Asia war shows no sign of ending. So how much of this oil crisis is the world still underestimating?

Global first, desi later: Ramayana's bold, big-screen bet beyond Indian box officeThe Ramayana teaser signals a bold global-first rollout, with the makers positioning the epic for international audiences from the outset. Here's why this ambitious approach, backed by scale and storytelling, could redefine how Indian epics travel worldwide.

UP man turns daughter's divorce into a celebration of freedom. Video is viralA Meerut family redefined divorce stigma by welcoming their daughter with drums, music and flowers after a long legal battle.

Replace GMT with Mahakal Standard Time: Education Minister's pitch gets pushbackArguing that Ujjain was the original hub of time calculation in the ancient world, Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan floated establishing a new global time standard called Mahakal Standard Time to replace Greenwich Mean Time.

Trump's taandav shakes global trust. Not just in him but in US that elects him twiceFrom mocking Macron's marriage to punishing India with tariffs, Trump has flipped the postwar order inside out. He is rewarding rivals, humiliating allies, and leaving the world to draw its own conclusions.

Matchmaking in India now comes with tips and therapyA new set of platforms has emerged, positioning themselves neither as casual dating apps nor traditional arranged marriage services, but somewhere in between as serious dating or date-to-marry platforms.
Question Time: Weekly News QuizThink you read the headlines this week? Let's test that!

Terminated: Trump claims Iran's military leaders killed in strike, shares videoUS President Donald Trump claimed that a "massive strike" in Tehran had killed several top Iranian military leaders, sharing a video on Truth Social purportedly showing the strike. Though the timing of the attack was not mentioned.

Brace up, India: Rain, hail and thunderstorms are arriving on SundayThe IMD has issued a high alert for Delhi-NCR on Sunday, April 5, as back-to-back western disturbances trigger a risk of thunderstorms and gusty winds reaching 50 kmph.

Watch: Artemis 2 astronauts show how they eat mac and cheese in spaceNasa Artemis II astronauts show how they eat mac and cheese and shrimp in microgravity. The crew uses rehydrated pouches to ensure no crumbs damage the Orion spacecraft during its lunar flyby.

Fake Income Tax officers arrive to scam UP shopkeepers, handed over to policeTraders in Shadiyabad and Saidpur markets had been complaining about extortion by a gang for several days. The gang members posed as income tax officials, conducted fake raids on shops, and intimidated traders into handing over large sums of money.

Recruit Hindus, don't stop Ghazwa-e-Hind plan: Another terror plot busted in UPA Pakistan-linked terror module used coded identities, social media recruitment, and Hindu youths as cover to scout sensitive sites. With a Dubai-based handler in the picture, investigators fear a wider network at play.

Humans are returning to the Moon. India is racing to catch up by 2040India has set 2040 as its deadline to land astronauts on the Moon. Here is the blueprint: the rockets, the science, and the sequenced missions that will get it there.

sports.headline: Rishabh Pant non-commital about LSG spot: Has team abandoned plans already? SRH vs LSG: Lucknow Super Giants captain was unsure if he would open for LSG in their second match of the IPL 2026 season. Have LSG dumped their plans already?

Mikel Arteta defends Arsenal players despite FA Cup exit: I take the responsibility Arsenal crashed out of the FA Cup quarterfinals after a 1-2 defeat to Southampton. Head coach Mikel Arteta defended his players and took responsibility for the loss. Despite injuries and setbacks, Arteta urged the squad to focus on the Premier League and UEFA Champions League as they aim to salvage their season.

My heart always beats a bit yellow: R Ashwin picks favorite ahead of RCB vs CSK RCB vs CSK: Former India all-rounder Ravichandran Ashwin picked Chennai Super Kings over Royal Challengers Bengaluru ahead of their IPL 2026 clash. The call was more emotional than logical, with Ashwin admitting that his heart 'beats a little yellow.'

SRH vs LSG Live Score: Sunrisers in tatters as Kishan departs Hyderabad (SRH) vs Lucknow (LSG) Live Score, IPL 2026: Mohammed Shami has been stupendous thus far as he has dismissed both Travis Head and Abhishek Sharma to put the Sunrisers under immense pressure. The onus is now on Ishan Kishan and Liam Livingstone to steady the ship for the home team.

CSK urged to pick West Indies spinner in RCB clash to spark comeback: No brainer IPL 2026, RCB vs CSK: Former cricketers Ambati Rayudu and Aaron Finch have urged CSK to include left-arm spinner Akeal Hosein, praising his flexibility and effectiveness in both powerplay and middle overs.

Sameer Rizvi's DC success a salute to Indian domestic cricket: Ex-India star IPL 2026: Mohammed Kaif praised Sameer Rizvi's IPL rise as a product of domestic grind. The DC youngster backed it up with a match-winning 90 vs MI.

Simeone slams VAR calls in Barcelona's controversial win vs Atletico Madrid Diego Simeone questioned refereeing consistency after a VAR-heavy clash saw Atletico Madrid lose 2-1 to Barcelona. The result pushed Barcelona seven points clear at the top of La Liga following Real Madrid's slip at Mallorca.

Rishabh Pant should open for LSG, management hiding something: Ashwin IPL 2026:R Ashwin has urged LSG to show clarity over Rishabh Pant's batting role. The former spinner believes Pant should be backed as a full-time opener.

RCB smell blood in Bengaluru as CSK crisis risks becoming catastrophe IPL 2026, RCB vs CSK preview: The balance of power has rarely tilted this far as RCB host CSK in Bengaluru, with the defending champions in control and a faltering Super Kings side already under pressure to arrest an alarming early-season slide.

In the corridor of control: Mukesh Kumar follows Hazlewood's map for T20 success IPL 2026, DC vs MI: By following a blueprint built on discipline and clarity, one perfected by Josh Hazlewood, Mukesh Kumar is finding his rhythm again and delivering the goods for Delhi Capitals.

Ravi Bishnoi opens up on tough IPL comeback with RR, what went wrong at LSG IPL 2026: Ravi Bishnoi starred with a four-wicket haul to script RR's win over GT. The spinner opened up on his tough IPL phase and how he worked his way back.

IPL Play of The Day: Parag's plan and Archer-Tushar twin act stuns AhmedabadIPL 2026, GT vs RR: Riyan Parag's bold call to back Jofra Archer and Tushar Deshpande paid off as Rajasthan Royals held their nerve to defend 11 in the final over and seal a tense win over Gujarat Titans.

Confident SRH lick their lips as LSG face tough test in bowler's graveyardIPL 2026, SRH vs LSG:Sunrisers Hyderabad will be looking to build on their win over Kolkata Knight Riders, while Lucknow Super Giants will be eager to bounce back from their defeat to Delhi Capitals.

B***s of steel: Shastri leads praise for Parag's leadership after Ahmedabad winRiyan Parag's bold call at the death drew praise from Ravi Shastri and Irfan Pathan after Rajasthan Royals held their nerve to defend 211 and seal a thrilling win over Gujarat Titans in Ahmedabad.

GT vs RR: Ice-cool Rajasthan Royals win last-ball thriller in Ahmedabad to go topIPL 2026, RR vs GT: Rajasthan Royals did the basics right in Ahmedabad to clinch a gripping Saturday night thriller. After posting 210, they fought back through Ravi Bishnoi's four-wicket haul and a superb death-overs effort from Jofra Archer and Tushar Deshpande.

154.2 kph: GT pacer Ashok Sharma fires a rocket vs RR, enters IPL's fastest clubAshok Sharma announced himself as IPL 2026's fastest bowler with a stunning 154.2 kph delivery for Gujarat Titans against Rajasthan Royals on Saturday. The 23-year-old earned praise from Dale Steyn, who highlighted his smooth, powerful action and near-perfect front-leg brace.

Sameer Rizvi makes case to be DC's No.4, but Axar Patel wants to keep options openIPL 2026: Sameer Rizvi's 90 powers Delhi Capitals past Mumbai Indians, but Axar Patel says selection will remain flexible despite the youngster's strong performances.

Shubman Gill misses Rajasthan Royals clash in injury concern for Gujarat TitansIPL 2026, GT vs RR: Shubman Gill missed the clash against Rajasthan Royals due to a muscle spasm. Rashid Khan led the side in his absence, while Kumar Kushagra replaced him in the playing XI.

Sameer Rizvi blitz sinks Mumbai Indians in Delhi as DC make it two in a rowIPL 2026, DC vs MI: Sameer Rizvi backed up his Lucknow masterclass with a masterful 90 at the Arun Jaitley Stadium to help Delhi Capitals make it two out of two. The home team chased 163 with ease, sealing a comprehensive six-wicket win over Mumbai Indians with two overs to spare.

Bangladesh cricket board moves to repair BCCI ties as president Bulbul under fireThere is strong resentment in the Bangladesh cricket corridors about Animul Islam Bulbul's continuation, especially after Bangladesh pulled out of the men's T20 World Cup in India.

GT vs RR Highlights: RR victorious in last-ball thriller to win by 6 runsGujarat (GT) vs Rajasthan (RR) Highlights, IPL 2026: Despite losing track in the final stretch, the Rajasthan Royals have managed to come out victorious, by six runs, to take them to the top of the table.

DC vs MI: Hitman Rohit Sharma plays bluff man, dupes Delhi into a wasted reviewIPL 2026: Rohit Sharma's cheeky ploy fooled Delhi Capitals into wasting a review, which he later admitted was deliberate. His entertaining knock, however, ended soon after, as Mumbai Indians were restricted to a below-par total at Arun Jaitley Stadium in New Delhi.

Pat Cummins heads home for a final scan, expected to join SRH on April 17Pat Cummins has returned to Australia for a final scan on his injured back and is expected to rejoin Sunrisers Hyderabad on April 17 after clearance from Cricket Australia. In his absence, Ishan Kishan has led the team as stand-in captain, with Abhishek Sharma as deputy

Watch: Magnus Carlsen agrees to selfie with opponent, then gets phone removedMagnus Carlsen shared a brief pre-match selfie with Alua Nurman before their Grenke Open clash, but quickly called an arbiter to enforce rules, highlighting chess's strict stance on devices.

Abuse me if you want, CSK are disappointing: Ashwin loses cool after PBKS lossIPL 2026: R Ashwin delivered an emotional assessment of CSK after their loss to PBKS. The former spinner said the team's drop in intensity was "painful to watch."

IPL, GT vs RR Preview: Boss Baby Sooryavanshi ready to rumble in AhmedabadIPL 2026: Expect fireworks at the Narendra Modi Stadium as 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi leads Rajasthan Royals' explosive top order against Gujarat Titans' star-studded lineup.

Mumbai Indians rest Hardik Pandya for Delhi Capitals clash, Suryakumar Yadav leadsIPL 2026, DC vs MI: Hardik Pandya has been rested for Mumbai Indians' first away game this season against the Delhi Capitals. In his absence, Suryakumar Yadav will lead the five-time winners.

Assam football legend Gilbertson Sangma dies at 71, leaves lasting legacyGilbertson Sangma, known as Assam's "Man with the Golden Boot", died at the age of 71 in his Guwahati residence. The forward played a key role in shaping the state's football legacy.

DC vs MI Highlights: Sameer Rizvi's special gives Delhi Capitals win by 6 wktsDelhi Capitals (DC) vs Mumbai Indians (MI) Highlights, IPL 2026: Sameer Rizvi's special performance leaves Mumbai Indians scratching their heads. Delhi Capitals make it two wins in a row after beating MI by 6 wickets.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is the best player I've seen: Jos Buttler praises RR wonderboyIPL 2026: GT star batter Jos Buttler heaped praise on 15-year-old RR wonderkid Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in a viral moment. The England star backed the youngster to dominate world cricket in the years ahead.

CSK's biggest concern for the rest of IPL 2026 will be bowling, warns Sunil GavaskarIPL 2026, CSK vs PBKS: Sunil Gavaskar said Chennai Super Kings' bowling remains a major concern after their defeat to Punjab Kings, adding that the batters will be under pressure to post big totals in most matches.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
